meaning: n.鬼鬼祟祟的人,卑鄙者,运动鞋
examples: After three days without a winner, he X-rayed his sneaker out of boredom.
It resembles the kind of small sneaker store you might find in a low-end American mall.
All of them, every sneaker, boot and sandal, every high heel and clog, every flip-flop. What do I do?
The commercial campaign coincides with the release date of the new Nike LeBron 8 sneaker.
The sneaker is made partly from recycled components from old sneakers and water-based solvents.
